name: SetFileName_Packing_list
scriptCode:
import json

data = json.loads(input_json)

result_item = data[0] 
headers = {
        "custom_fileName": result_item["filename"]}

prefix = "/FileImport/IDP/PL_IN/"

result_item["filename"] = prefix + result_item["filename"]



output_json = json.dumps(result_item, indent=2)
output_header = json.dumps(headers)
